confirm_delete_transaction_message: Are you sure you want to delete this transaction? This action cannot be undone.

about.intro_title: Build Your Assets Step by Step
about.intro_description: C'AGOK is a local-based account book that helps you accurately understand your spending habits by manual entry without complex linking. No login required, and all data is securely stored only on your device.
about.feature_local_desc: Stored securely in an SQLite database on your PC.
about.feature_sync_desc: Optionally backup your data via OneDrive.
about.privacy_subtitle: Check data collection and security policies

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1_desc_bold: transmit or collect any financial information,
privacy.section1_desc_2: transaction history, or personally identifiable information entered by the user to external servers. All traffic is only for app updates or user-initiated cloud backups.
privacy.section2_desc_1: All data is stored in an
privacy.section2_desc_2: on the user's local disk. The user is solely responsible for data management, and local data may be deleted upon app removal.
privacy.section3_desc: This service has no registration process and does not provide user data to third parties. If using OneDrive sync, data is stored only in the user's personal OneDrive account.
privacy.footer_badge_desc_2: Your financial data stays only on your device.
